WalletProfile.title: WalletProfile
WalletProfile.description: Represents a user wallet profile with connected reputation metrics and custom overlays.

connectedAt.description: Timestamp when the wallet was first connected

verifiedNfts.description: List of verified NFT mints owned by the wallet

detectedAlignment.description: The cosmic alignment detected based on address credentials

detectedSeed.description: Seed used to generate custom butterfly features

isEvolved.description: Whether the butterfly has been evolved or mutated

selectedBadge.description: Currently selected badge for the overlay

customOverlayImg.description: Custom overlay image content or base64 data

isCustomApplied.description: Whether custom overlay styling is applied

/wallets/{walletId}.description: Collection of wallet profiles tracking reputation and badging configuration
